word: H1690 - דְּבֵלָה - dᵉbêlâh - deb-ay-law' - Cake of figs

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּבלה

Transliteration: debêlâh

Phonetic: deb-ay-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. fig cake, lump of pressed figs

Origin: from an unused root (akin to H2082)

TWOT entry: 397a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
